info.name: EduSuite API — Finance Module
info.description:
Test suite for all Finance module endpoints.

## Prerequisites
1. Apply the finance seed block from `db/setup/04_seed_data.sql` — it adds a GL account (`fa000000...001`) and fiscal year (`fb000000...001`) for Hogwarts. Folder 01 **will fail** without this.
2. Run folders in order — each one cascades IDs to the next.

## Idempotency
Account creation (folder 02) accepts both 201 and 409, so the collection can be re-run against a database that already has data.

## What needs real seed data to test happy paths
- **SAP appeals** — requires a failing evaluation. Only guard paths (400/404) are tested.
- **VA certifications** — requires a `veteran_profiles` row. Only guard paths tested. Insert a row for Ron to test the full flow.
- **Payroll** — requires payroll runs to exist. List endpoints return empty arrays on a fresh DB.

## Tenant
All requests use **Hogwarts School** (`hogwarts.edu`) — `admin_hogwarts` / `password`.

exec: console.log('✅ Logged in — finance test suite starting');
console.log('✅ GL AR account confirmed:', arAccount ? arAccount.account_name : 'NOT FOUND');
console.log('✅ Fiscal year confirmed:', fy ? fy.name : 'NOT FOUND');
} else { console.warn('Ron account already exists — idempotent re-run'); }
console.log('Ron account ID:', b.id, '| Balance:', b.current_balance);
console.log('Tuition charge posted. New balance:', b.updated_balance);

body.raw:
{
  "transaction_type": "tuition_charge",
  "amount": 3500.0,
  "description": "Fall 2024 Tuition \u2014 Defence Against the Dark Arts",
  "gl_account_id": "fa000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001",
  "term_id": "f3000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001",
  "reference_number": "DFDA-2024-001"
}

item.name: POST transactions — 400 charge type with negative amount
POST transactions — 400 payment type with positive amount

exec: pm.test('GL account name correct', () => pm.expect(b.gl_account_name).to.eql('Student Accounts Receivable'));

item.name: GET /fafsa — Ron (empty OK — no FAFSA seed data)
POST aid-awards — Pell grant for Ron
POST aid-awards — Federal subsidized loan for Ron
POST aid-awards — 400 status disbursed on creation
PATCH aid-awards — disburse Pell grant (cross-module write)

exec: console.log('✅ Pell disbursed — check Ron account for aid_disbursement credit');

item.name: GET transactions — verify aid_disbursement posted to Ron account

exec: console.log('✅ Cross-module write confirmed — disbursement transaction on Ron account');
console.log('SAP evaluations for Ron:', b.total, '(0 expected — no seed evals)');

item.name: POST appeal — 400 empty reason (validation fires before DB)
GET veteran-profile — Ron (404 — no veteran profile seeded)

exec: console.log('Expected 404 — Ron has no veteran profile in seed data');
console.log('Payroll runs:', b.total, '(0 expected on fresh DB)');
console.log('✅ Finance collection complete. Session revoked.');
